domain: Japanese aikido shu-ha-ri 3-stage learning progression (Morihei Ueshiba, 20th century): shu (preserve) → ha (break-form) → ri (transcend); fixed-form fidelity in shu; break-form variation in ha; transcend-form expert generation in ri; dojo lineage validation gates each stage.
specific_mechanism: AIKIDO-SHU-HA-RI-3STAGE-FIXED-BREAK-TRANSCEND-DOJO: (1) S_3stage 3-stage progression; (2) F_shu fixed-form fidelity preservation; (3) B_ha break-form variation; (4) R_ri transcend-form expert generation; (5) V_dojo dojo lineage validation gate.
llm_application: AIKIDO mechanism + S_3stage + F_shu + B_ha + R_ri + V_dojo. Differs from R583/R508/R521/R533/R546/R558/R571. Differs from MLE-Dojo + FT-Dojo + 3-stage RLHF + Curriculum + Lineage by shu/ha/ri 3-stage + fixed/break/transcend differentiation + dojo gates.
novelty_claim: Training lit broad. AIKIDO adds 5-mechanism composite. K=5.
